benchmarks.name: Create 10k entities
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Basic Entity Operations should create 10,000 entities in under 100ms

benchmarks.name: Lookup 10k entities by ID
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Basic Entity Operations should handle entity lookup by ID efficiently

benchmarks.name: Add/remove 1k components
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Component Management should add/remove components efficiently

benchmarks.name: Create 1k entities with 5 components each
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Component Management should handle multiple components per entity

benchmarks.name: Component lookup (10k iterations)
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Component Management should lookup components efficiently

benchmarks.name: Add 1k children to parent
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Entity Hierarchy should handle adding children efficiently

benchmarks.name: Build deep hierarchy (1k levels)
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Entity Hierarchy should handle deep hierarchy efficiently

benchmarks.name: Remove 1k children
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Entity Hierarchy should handle entity removal efficiently

benchmarks.name: Create 10k entities (with memory tracking)
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Memory Usage should track memory usage for entity creation

benchmarks.name: Simple entities
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Comparative Benchmarks should compare different entity creation patterns

benchmarks.name: Entities with position
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Comparative Benchmarks should compare different entity creation patterns

benchmarks.name: Entities with components
benchmarks.testName: Performance: Entity Creation Comparative Benchmarks should compare different entity creation patterns
